name: Crumbled Danish Blue Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the wine vinegar, salt, sugar, Tabasco sauce, and lemon juice until the sugar and salt dissolve.
2. Gradually blend in the salad oil using a spoon or whisk, ensuring there are no clumps of oil.
3. Crumble the Danish blue cheese with a fork and fold it into the dressing.
4. Before using the dressing, gently stir it to combine all ingredients.
5. Toss the washed and dried salad greens (preferably romaine) with the dressing.
